title: Acianthera miguelii
taxonomy: Acianthera miguelii is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Acianthera miguelii is classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Acianthera is a part of the tribe Epidendreae, and Acianthera miguelii is one of its species. The classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other orchid species.
